issues.description: Keyword should be 'AttackActiveCharacters' not 'Unblockable'. The effect grants the ability to attack active Characters, not bypass blockers.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'during this turn' which indicates the effect lasts for the current turn only, not persisting through end of turn.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Up to 1 of your {Navy} type Leader or Character cards can also attack active Characters during this turn.
